race.description: Summerset Retirement Village Cranbourne Maiden Plate
race.comment: Tricky little race. RUBARE (9) resumes having run in a Listed race on debut, okay there in a handy form race given subsequent G1 winner Streisand finished second. RUBARE was tipped out after that and has returned with a jumpout win, expect she goes close back to maiden company. ARAGOG (1) is a colt by Dundeel on debut for the Stokes yard. He's looked good at the jumpouts and has to be respected. RUDOLFINA (10) ran an even race fresh behind Medicinal which is very strong form. She can improve off that and doubt there's anything of that quality here. SUNBLISS (11) is a filly by The Autumn Sun on debut for the Price & Kent Jnr yard, respecting with Jamie Melham booked. AROUND THE MARX (2) has shown ability in two runs to date and is up and going.
